feed.title: Looooooong
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Paper A Charge-Sharing Locking Technique With a General Phase Noise Theory of Injection Locking

link.title: Paper A Charge-Sharing Locking Technique With a General Phase Noise Theory of Injection Locking

entry.summary: From Robert Bogdan Staszewski Group’s Paper Phase Noise of Charges-Sharing Locking Timestamps of Oscillator and Reference \[\begin{align} t_{ref}[n] &= n T_{ref} + \Delta t_{ref}[n]\\ t_{osc}[k] &= k T_{osc} + \Delta t_{osc}[k] = \sum_{m=1}^{k}(T_{osc} + \Delta T_{osc}[m])\\ T_{ref} &= N T_{osc} \iff z_{ref}^{-1} = z_{osc}^{-N} \iff z_{osc}^{-1} = z_{ref}^{-1/N} \end{align}\] ...

entry.title: PLL 02
entry.summary: Paper Multirate Timestamp Modeling for Ultralow-Jitter Frequency Synthesis: A Tutorial High-bandwidth PLL (\(\ge 30 \% f_{ref}\)). ADPLL with TDC and digitial loop filter. Injection locking or charge-sharing locking oscillator. (a) Conceptual multirate timestamp model suitable for a high-bandwidth PLL. (b) Implementation details of the ADPLL blocks (ADC-based TDC and digital loop f...

entry.title: Laplace Transforms
entry.summary: Heaviside step function \[u(t) = \begin{cases} 1 & \text{ for } \quad t > 0,\\ 0 & \text{ for } \quad t \le 0 \end{cases}\] \(H(s)\) \(h(t)\) \(\text{init cond}\)1 \(1/s\) \(u(t)\) - \(1/s^2\) \(r(t) = t \cdot u(t)\) - \(\dfrac{1}{s+a}\) \(e^{-at} \cdot u(t)\) \(...

entry.title: Measure Theory 04
entry.summary:
Caratheodory’s Extension Theorem We already know given a \(\sigma\)-additive \(\mu: \mathscr{S} 	o [0,\infty]\), there is an unique extension to an algebra with \(\sigma\)-additive \(
u: \mathscr{A}(\mathscr{S}) 	o [0,\infty]\), with \(
u(A) = \mu(A)  orall A \in \mathscr{A}(\mathscr{S})\), in fact, the set function is \[
u(E) = \sum_{j=1}^{n}\mu(E_j)\] where \(E_j \in \mathscr{S}\) ...

entry.title: Measure Theory 03
entry.summary: Set Functions Additive Given \(\mathscr{C} \subseteq \mathscr{P}(\Omega)\) and \(\emptyset \in \mathscr{C}\). The function \(\mu: \mathscr{C} \to \mathbb{R}_+ \cup \{\infty\}\) is additive, if and only if (i) \(\mu(\emptyset) = 0\) (ii) if disjoint \(E_1, E_2, \dots, E_n \in \mathscr{C}\), and \(E = \sum_{j=1}^{n}E_j \in \mathscr{C}\), then \(\mu(E) = \sum_{j=1}^n \mu(E_j)\). We can natu...
